channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Threat from Iran conflict spreads across Middle East in 72 hours - The Washington Post
item.description:
1. Threat from Iran conflict spreads across Middle East in 72 hours  The Washington Post
  2. Why did US and Israel attack Iran and how long could the war last?  BBC
  3. Iran war live: Israel strikes Tehran and Beirut; drones hit US embassy in Riyadh  Reuters
  4. March 1, 2026 — Day two of the launch of a US-Israeli military operation against Iran  CNN
  5. IDF: Air Force struck Iran's 'leadership complex,' including presidential bureau, in Tehran overnight  The Times of Israel

item.title: Trump takes unconventional approach to communicating to the public about war in Iran - AP News
item.description:
1. Trump takes unconventional approach to communicating to the public about war in Iran  AP News
  2. ‘I Have Agreed to Talk’  The Atlantic
  3. Morning Bid: Trump's 'whatever it takes' vow deepens stock selloff, lifts oil  Reuters
  4. Trump Says Iran War Could Last Weeks and Gives Competing Visions of New Regime  The New York Times
  5. Trump’s Case for War With Iran Faces Growing Scrutiny  WSJ

item.title: US orders some diplomatic staff to leave Middle East as Iran conflict escalates - Reuters
item.description:
1. US orders some diplomatic staff to leave Middle East as Iran conflict escalates  Reuters
  2. US urges citizens to immediately leave over a dozen Middle East countries  Al Jazeera
  3. As Iran expands retaliatory attacks, U.S. urges Americans to leave Middle East  PBS
  4. State Department urges Americans across Mideast to depart as strikes continue  NBC News

item.title: Israel Strikes Hezbollah in Beirut as Northern Front Heats Up - WSJ
item.description: Israel Strikes Hezbollah in Beirut as Northern Front Heats Up  WSJView Full Coverage on Google News

item.title: U.S. Attacks on Iran Test Fragile Truce With China - The New York Times
item.description:
1. U.S. Attacks on Iran Test Fragile Truce With China  The New York Times
  2. Attack on Iran could buoy Trump in talks with China's Xi  Reuters
  3. Beijing Doesn’t Think Like Washington—and the Iran Conflict Shows Why  Carnegie Endowment for International Peace
  4. China’s ice-cold calculus over Iran  The Economist
  5. Trump’s show of force in the Middle East creates a weakness China can exploit  The Guardian

item.title: Trump says 'sad to see' US-UK relationship is not what it was - Reuters
item.description:
1. Trump says 'sad to see' US-UK relationship is not what it was  Reuters

  4. Trump rebukes Starmer over UK refusal to back strikes on Iran  The Guardian

item.title: Macron says France to increase its nuclear arsenal - DW.com
item.description:
1. Macron says France to increase its nuclear arsenal  DW.com

item.title: Airlines are being squeezed into this sliver of sky to avoid closed airspace - Business Insider
item.description:

item.title: Intelligence assessment warns of Iranian attacks on US following Khamenei's death - Reuters

item.title: About 10% of global container fleet caught in Hormuz backup, shipping CEO says - Reuters

item.title: Qatar Says It Shot Down Two Iranian Bombers - The New York Times
item.description:

item.title: Pakistan Strikes Bagram Air Base, Satellite Images Show - The New York Times
item.description:

item.title: Travelers Stuck in Dubai Face ‘Chaos and Confusion’ Amid Flight Cancellations - The New York Times
item.description:
1. Travelers Stuck in Dubai Face ‘Chaos and Confusion’ Amid Flight Cancellations  The New York Times
  2. 'I saw missiles being intercepted': Influencers tell of shock as Iran hits Dubai's luxury landmarks  BBC
  3. I flew to Dubai for my 30th birthday. Now I'm stranded 8,000 miles from home and terrified after the US strikes on Iran.  Business Insider
  4. They flew to Dubai for a romantic anniversary getaway. Then the bombing started.  NBC News
  5. Group of Chicagoans stuck in Dubai amid U.S.-Israel war against Iran  CBS News
